mapper.sql:
SELECT ID, TUG_CODE, TUG_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_TUG
and TUG_CODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{tugCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}),'%')
and TUG_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{tugName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,'%')
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TUG_CODE, TUG_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_TUG
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_TUG(ID, TUG_CODE, TUG_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tugCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tugName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_TUG SET TUG_CODE = #{tugCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TUG_NAME = #{tugName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
